ogTitle: Pira vs Pirron Yallock: Climate Safety

heading: Pira vs Pirron Yallock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pira, Victoria and Pirron Yallock, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pira has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pirron Yallock (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pira or Pirron Yallock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pira has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Pirron Yallock scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pira scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Pirron Yallock scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pira or Pirron Yallock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pira has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
